title: Data Scaling Path
description: Build fluency in Data Scaling inside Data Preprocessing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Batch Normalization
steps.summary: A technique used to normalize the inputs to a neural network, helping to stabilize the training process. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Scaling. Start after Normalization. It opens into Batch Re-Normalization and Ghost Batch Normalization.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Additive Log-Ratio Transformation (ALR)
steps.summary: ** Additive Log-Ratio Transformation (ALR) belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Scaling. Start after Additive Log-Ratio Transformation and Log Ratio Transformation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Adaptive Instance Normalization (AdaIN)
steps.summary: ** Adaptive Instance Normalization (AdaIN) belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Scaling. Start after Adaptive Instance Normalization and Adaptive Normalization.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Accumulated Local Effects (ALE)
steps.summary: ** Accumulated Local Effects (ALE) belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Scaling. Compare it with Local Response Normalization Techniques and Local Response Normalization Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Temperature Scaling Techniques
steps.summary: Temperature Scaling Techniques belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Scaling. Start after Temperature Scaling and Model Scaling. It opens into Temperature Scaling Extensions Techniques and Temperature Scaling Extensions Techniques Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Temperature Scaling Extensions
steps.summary: Temperature Scaling Extensions belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Scaling. Start after Temperature Scaling and Model Scaling. It opens into Temperature Scaling Extensions Techniques and Temperature Scaling Extensions Techniques Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Data Augmentation with Scaling
steps.summary: Data Augmentation with Scaling belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Scaling. Start after Data Scaling and Model Scaling. It opens into Data Augmentation with Random Scaling and Data Augmentation with Feature Scaling.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Local Response Normalization Techniques
steps.summary: Local Response Normalization Techniques belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Scaling. Start after Local Response Normalization and Normalization Techniques. It opens into Local Response Normalization (LRN) Techniques and Local Response Normalization Techniques Enhancements Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
